skills.name: pr-reviewer
skills.description: Review pull requests for correctness, maintainability, test coverage, and regression risk using concrete code evidence.

skills.name: test-writer
skills.description: Design and implement focused tests from feature requirements, bug reports, and changed code paths.

skills.name: zodjs-v4
skills.description: Apply Zod v4 best practices to design runtime-safe schemas, parsing boundaries, and actionable validation errors for TypeScript application code.

skills.name: weekly-review
skills.description: Produce a weekly review of goals, completed work, blockers, and next actions from personal notes and logs.

skills.name: paper-summarizer
skills.description: Summarize research papers into objective findings, method limits, and practical takeaways for engineering decisions.

skills.name: blog-editor
skills.description: Edit technical or product blog drafts for structure, clarity, factual flow, and audience alignment.

skills.name: concise-rewriter
skills.description: Rewrite long or noisy text into concise, high-signal output while preserving intent and key facts.
